chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1523 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA No. 5994/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 09.10.2025 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Hafeezullah Chandio, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General along with SIP Bahadur Larik/I.O..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Investigation officer is present, files statement which is taken on record and he submits that challan has been submitted against accused; case is pending before the trial Court. He further submits that bail application of accused has already been dismissed by trial Court and he is present on interim bail granted by this Court. Counsel for the petitioner affirms the same facts and does not press the instant petition on the ground the he will avail proper remedy. Under instructions, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
